title: vatica oblongifolia subsp. selakoensis
intro: Vatica oblongifolia subsp. selakoensis, also known as Selako Selat tree, is a subspecies of Vatica oblongifolia, a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vatica oblongifolia subsp. selakoensis include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to support health and wellness, but more studies are necessary to standardize its use and safety.
